creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Created attachment 175433
patch file (compressed)

I've fixed the Port japanese/dbskkd-cdb to follow the latest release avaialble in GitHub.

See fix-diff.gz for the patch file (note that the file READMEJP contains EUC-JP encoding and READMEJP.md contains UTF-8 encoding, so I've compressed the diff file to preserve the encoding).
See dbskkd.tar.gz for the patched port directory contents.

See https://github.com/jj1bdx/dbskkd-cdb/ for the original distribution.
See https://github.com/jj1bdx/freebsd-port-ja-dbskkd-cdb/ for a copy of the contents in this bug report (including the port directory).
